purpose: Regression-guard cases — correct fixes that BOTH SP and PF must allow. Pass criterion: PF allows all 5 (0 false positives from override).
research_source: docs/research/decision-d-b-root-cause-vs-symptom-2026-04-30.md (Wave 1.5; H-1/H-2/H-6 heuristics — these cases satisfy all three)

cases.scenario: Null pointer crash in checkout flow.
cases.debugger_root_cause: src/server/checkout/total.ts:18 — `cart.items.reduce(...)` called when cart.items is null after empty-cart edge case.
cases.fix: Add `cart.items?.reduce(...) ?? 0` at the call site. Touches debugger-identified line (H-2 satisfied); reverting reproduces the crash on the same input shape (H-1 satisfied); debug-doc Root Cause exists with file:line (H-6 satisfied).
Rename `frist_name` to `first_name` at the typo site. H-1/H-2/H-6 all satisfied; reverting reproduces the bug; fix is at the cause site; debug-doc identifies the typo line.

cases.scenario: Function returns Promise<Promise<Result>> instead of Promise<Result>.
cases.debugger_root_cause: src/server/queue/processor.ts:88 — `await job.run()` returns nested promise because `run()` is itself async-returning-async.
cases.fix: Add `await await job.run()` OR refactor `run()` to flatten. Touches debugger-identified line; reverting reproduces; debug-doc has it.

cases.scenario: Array index out of bounds when filter returns empty.
cases.fix: Replace `results[0]` with `results[0] ?? null`; render fallback. H-1/H-2/H-6 all satisfied.

cases.scenario: Insert fails with foreign-key constraint violation when parent record absent.
cases.debugger_root_cause: src/server/posts/create.ts:42 — author_id passed without verifying user exists in users table.
cases.fix: Verify user exists before insert; return 404 if not. Touches the insert-precondition site; reverting reproduces the FK error; debug-doc identifies the line.
